content:
Hi, I have a Chrome extension fully developed and ready to publish, but I have hit an unexpected blocker.
I am based in Croatia. My Google Payments profile, card and address are all Croatian, and I have already successfully published an Android app through Google Play. However, Croatia is not available at all in the Chrome Web Store developer-registration country list.
Chrome Web Store Developer Support confirmed that their underlying Google Pay system currently does not support Croatia for developer registration, with no estimated date for availability.
I do not want to use a fake address or risk an account suspension later.
Has anyone dealt with this from an unsupported country? Are there legitimate options such as publishing through a trusted foreign business partner, setting up a company in a supported country, or another compliant route?
I would appreciate practical advice from developers who have been in a similar situation.

  submitted by   /u/SnooCookies9165
[link]   [comments]
